autonomy_levels.name: Observe
gaps: Autonomy level persistence fails silently (slog.Warn on persist failure, resets to L0 on restart)
Decision outcome loop not closed for most decisions (only HandleSessionCompleteWithOutcome closes outcomes)
safety_gates: BootstrapAutonomy clamps .ralphrc values above L1 to L1

autonomy_levels.name: AutoRecover
gaps: R-01 CRITICAL: AutoRecovery.retryState map has no mutex
Supervisor swallows RunCycle errors at Warn level
RunLoop error buried in handler_selfimprove.go
Hook exit codes silently discarded (hooks.go:139)
safety_gates: Exponential backoff with configurable cooldown (30s base, 2x factor)
Decision log integration for restart proposals

autonomy_levels.name: AutoOptimize
gaps: 3 budget enforcement gaps (Gap A: $0 cap, Gap B: no active session stop, Gap C: stale pool.State)
Gemini Flash output rate 40% off in compiled-in costs
DecisionModel untrained (needs 50+ multi-provider observations, only have Claude data)
Supervisor has never run on Manjaro (only macOS state file observed)
R-03 HIGH: GateEnabled unprotected package-level var
R-05 HIGH: GetTeam inconsistent lock ordering
R-06 HIGH: loadedGroups map accessed without mutex
safety_gates: GateChange validates L2 changes against test suite
ImprovementNote auto-application with rollback on gate failure
Budget envelope with per-cycle cap and termination conditions
Cooldown enforcement (5-minute minimum between cycle launches)

autonomy_levels.name: FullAutonomy
gaps: All L1 and L2 issues amplified by 128-session concurrency
$1,280/hr theoretical max spend with no fleet-level hard ceiling
Sweep fan-out is serial (6+ min for 74 repos)
Autoscaler scale-up is advisory only (no worker spawning)
Queue not persisted (coordinator restart loses all state)
Supervisor tick goroutines untracked (no WaitGroup)
~100 tasks remain across 6 unstarted phases (all 0%)
safety_gates: AutoMergeAll mode for fully unattended self-improvement
Cycle chaining with depth cap of 10 and lineage tracking
Sprint planner for roadmap-driven task generation
HyperagentEngine confidence >= 0.8 requirement, rate limited to 3/hour

top_findings.summary: AutoRecovery.retryState map accessed from concurrent goroutines with no mutex -- fatal concurrent map write
RetryTracker.attempts map in fleet package has no lock; HTTP handlers race on it
5 BLOCKER path traversal vulnerabilities in MCP handlers -- scratchpadName, name, worktree_paths, hooks.yaml command, verify_commands bypass ValidatePath
MaxBudgetUSD == 0 path allows sessions to launch with no spend cap when DefaultBudgetUSD is also zero
Unbounded in-memory WorkQueue -- no capacity limit; can grow to OOM under heavy sweep load
Fleet coordinator queue is in-memory only; restart loses all pending/assigned work and orphans in-flight results
Supervisor silently swallows RunCycle failures at Warn level -- at L2/L3, cycles fail invisibly
internal/knowledge fatal concurrent map writes in TieredKnowledge.Query -- active race condition
Circuit breaker shared across all 3 LLM providers -- one flaky provider trips the CB for all
Self-improvement loop error silently discarded (_ = s.SessMgr.RunLoop) -- invisible failure at L2+ autonomy

risk_register.scenario: Concurrent map write crashes in AutoRecovery.retryState or RetryTracker.attempts during fleet operations
risk_register.mitigation: Add sync.Mutex to both structs (R-01, R-02)

risk_register.scenario: Path traversal in MCP handlers allows arbitrary file read/write via scratchpadName or worktree_paths
risk_register.mitigation: Add ValidatePath to all 5 identified handler params

risk_register.scenario: Unbounded fleet queue exhausts memory during large sweep operations
risk_register.mitigation: Add MaxDepth parameter to WorkQueue with rejection on overflow

risk_register.scenario: Coordinator restart loses all pending work and budget tracking mid-sweep
risk_register.mitigation: Wire SaveTo/LoadFrom in 30s maintenance loop and on Stop

risk_register.scenario: Sessions launch with $0 budget cap, running up unlimited spend
L3 autonomous fleet runs at $1,280/hr with no global ceiling
risk_register.mitigation: Add fleet-level hard spend ceiling; proactive budget event-driven enforcement

risk_register.scenario: Supervisor silently fails cycles for hours at L2 with no operator alert
risk_register.mitigation: Surface cycle failures at Error level, emit event, demote autonomy after N failures

risk_register.scenario: Planner JSON format failures cause 25.7% retry rate, degrading autonomous loop efficiency
risk_register.mitigation: Adopt structured output format; add fallback JSON parser

risk_register.scenario: Stale compiled-in cost rates cause 40-67% misestimation of Gemini and Opus costs
risk_register.mitigation: Update config/costs.go to April 2026 pricing; add cost rate drift alerting

risk_register.scenario: Thin client boots without disk encryption, exposing API keys
risk_register.mitigation: Add LUKS encryption to thin client build; integrate 1Password CLI for secrets

immediate: Fix R-01: Add sync.Mutex to AutoRecovery.retryState
Fix R-02: Add sync.Mutex to RetryTracker.attempts
Fix R-06: Protect loadedGroups map with s.mu in MCP server
Fix 5 BLOCKER path traversal vulnerabilities in MCP handlers
Fix 7 failing test packages to achieve green go test -race ./...
Close budget Gap A: enforce mandatory $5 default floor when DefaultBudgetUSD == 0
Update compiled-in provider cost rates to April 2026 pricing
Surface supervisor cycle failures at Error level with event emission
Propagate RunLoop error in handler_selfimprove.go background goroutine
medium_term: Activate deferred loading in production binary (DeferredLoading = true)
Migrate from mcp-go v0.46.0 to official modelcontextprotocol/go-sdk
Split advanced namespace (24 tools) into rc, autonomy, workflow sub-namespaces
Implement 4-tier cascade routing with GPT-4.1-nano as Tier 0 classifier
Enable prompt caching across all 3 providers in session launch path
Add max-lines cap to LogView.Lines (ring buffer, 10,000 default)
Replace 2s polling tick with event bus subscription for session state changes
Fix planner JSON reliability to <5% retry rate (structured output, fallback parser)
Run supervisor on Manjaro for 24+ hours and validate L2 readiness
long_term: Complete ISO build pipeline for Manjaro Sway bootable thin client
Implement LUKS disk encryption and 1Password CLI secrets management
Complete A2A protocol integration with official Go SDK (a2aproject/a2a-go/v2)
Implement NATS transport and multi-node coordination for fleet scaling
Complete Phase 13 Level 3 Autonomy Core (self-heal, decision engine, unattended ops)
Implement Firecracker/gVisor sandboxing for untrusted agent sessions
Ship evaluation harness (SWE-bench, tau-bench, pass@k measurement)
Complete SQLite WAL migration to replace dual-write persistence
Implement Tool RAG for dynamic tool selection from 166-tool surface
Achieve 72-hour unattended L3 operation with safety boundaries

gaps: G-01: Plugin system architecture -- no deep analysis of internal/plugin/ gRPC interface, marketplace, or lifecycle
G-02: Sandbox infrastructure -- no analysis of Docker, Firecracker, gVisor, or Incus implementations in internal/sandbox/
G-03: Store/SQLite migration path -- no analysis of internal/store/sqlite.go implementation details
G-04: Kubernetes controller -- no architectural analysis of internal/k8s/ pod lifecycle, CRD, or controller logic
G-05: Marathon subsystem depth -- no deep architectural analysis of marathon loop, restart policies, or cloud scheduler
G-06: Event bus architecture -- no analysis of internal/events/ NATS integration, capacity, or subscriber patterns
G-07: Bandit/UCB cascade details -- no analysis of internal/bandit/ Thompson sampling, UCB, or exploration tuning
G-08: First-boot wizard -- no analysis of firstboot.go TUI view wizard steps
G-09: Workflow engine depth -- no analysis of workflow YAML schema, executor, or step isolation
G-10: Cross-repo tool interaction -- no analysis of tool composition patterns or cross-namespace dependencies
